description: Used improving-pdf skill (Improving-branded PDF) for a personal prep sheet destined for David reMarkable tablet. Improving branding is for company/client deliverables, not personal reference documents.
correction: Use a plain/unbranded PDF generator for personal documents. Reserve improving-pdf for Improving deliverables.
systemic_fix: Add rule: improving-pdf is for Improving-branded deliverables only. Personal docs (reMarkable, personal reference, internal notes) should use a clean/unbranded PDF generator.
